query:
SELECT 
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM orgNotes WHERE organizationId = 990001) as notes_files,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM intakeFileAttachments WHERE organizationId = 990001) as intake_files,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM fileAttachments WHERE organizationId = 990001) as task_files;

  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM orgNotes WHERE organizationId = 990001) as notes_files,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM intakeFileAttachments WHERE organizationId = 990001) as intake_files,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM fileAttachments WHERE organizationId = 990001) as task_files;
